How it works

Check the car first, decide later

For each car, we first arrange an inspection, which results in a complete report on the technical condition of the car. Only then do you decide whether you want to buy the car.

We keep the guarantee!

We don't doubt the cars you buy from us, but for your peace of mind, we'll give you a 6-month warranty on the essentials - engine, transmission, differential - in addition to the warranty on hidden defects. If you still don't like the car, you can return it to us within 14 days of receipt.

Delivery time

We can deliver most cars within 20 business days from the confirmation of your order and receipt of payment. Depending on the specific location of the vehicle and the legal timeframes required for administrative procedures, which vary between countries, the expected delivery time may be extended.

Consent Settings for Analytics and Marketing

By clicking “Accept all” you give Carvago s.r.o and other companies in its business group permission to use your personal data, such as your e-mail address, and to use cookies for personalisation, analysis, and targeted marketing. You will find more information about cookies and the way they can be used under “Settings”.
